query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ad_campaigns (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  brandId INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  platform ENUM('tiktok', 'facebook', 'instagram', 'google', 'youtube', 'other') DEFAULT 'tiktok' NOT NULL,
  objective ENUM('impressions', 'clicks', 'conversions', 'awareness', 'engagement') DEFAULT 'impressions' NOT NULL,
  objectiveConfidence INT,
  startDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  endDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  budget BIGINT,
  actualSpend BIGINT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'active', 'paused', 'completed') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  detectedLanguage VARCHAR(10),
  sourceFileUrl TEXT,
  sourceFileKey VARCHAR(512),
  rawData JSON,
  createdBy INT NOT NULL,
  createdByName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
